description:
Sub-epic covering inbound Move activity handling, domain block enforcement in the inbox router, and authorized fetch enforcement for actor documents.

## Scope
- Handle inbound Move activity with alsoKnownAs validation and follower migration
- Domain block enforcement in inbox handler and outbound delivery worker
- Authorized fetch (require HTTP signatures on actor GET requests when enabled)

## Parent
Phase 8: Polish and Tier 3 Endpoints (smallhold-s70)
title: Phase 8-B: Federation Lifecycle
